releaseNotes:
- Multi-root workspace + Git repo switcher (multi-repo, dedup by git root)
- Compose dialogs: keyboard-safe, in-window overlay, ease-in-out animation
- New closed/open folder icons + per-file-type icons + Pawn file icon
- Tighter row density for workspace tree & Git sidebar
- Instant save reflection: saved files color the tree & Changes right away
- Faster Git: cached repo handles reused, single scan per refresh
- Find in Files: no result cap, memory-adaptive stop (anti-OOM)
- Configurable live-editor (highlight) cache, unlimited mode available
- Custom autocomplete from your own .inc/.pwn files, per-category toggles
- Consistent, theme-aware highlight color in the completion popup
- "No files added." empty state for custom symbol files in Settings
- Ctrl+F/H/Shift+F shortcuts work even when editor isn't focused
- Fixes: CI icon, compile-FAB resize glitch, update-nag dialog crash, parser regex backtracking
